Infer the date from context.

Q: Today is Christmas Eve of 1937. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 12/14/2026
(B) 12/14/1950
(C) 12/14/2007
(D) 12/14/1937
(E) 07/14/1938
(F) 12/14/1988
A: (D)

Q: Tomorrow is 11/12/2019. What is the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 09/04/2018
(B) 11/11/2018
(C) 08/25/2018
(D) 11/02/2018
(E) 11/04/2018
A: (B)

Q: Jane and John married on Jan 2, 1958. It is their 5-year anniversary today. What is the date tomorrow in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 01/11/1961
(B) 01/03/1963
(C) 01/18/1961
(D) 10/14/1960
(E) 01/03/1982
(F) 12/03/1960
A: (B)

Q: Today is Sep 9, 1909. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 09/16/1952
(B) 09/16/1909
(C) 09/16/1876
(D) 08/22/1909
(E) 12/16/1909
(F) 10/14/1909
A:
action.label: context

action.content:
To find the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY, we need to add 7 days to September 9, 1909.

September has 30 days, so adding 7 days to September 9, 1909, would be September 16, 1909.

The correct answer is (B) 09/16/1909.
